body:
## Summary
- Fixes the remaining Linux desktop release gap from issue #479 by keeping the .deb metadata fix, Linux x64 artifact-name normalization, and full 14-asset idempotency guard.
- Fixes the PR-reported broken macOS DMG by copying the working `konard/vk-bot-desktop` release method: hardened runtime, entitlements, notarization when Apple secrets exist, an explicit guarded `@electron/osx-sign` ad-hoc fallback when they do not, and a pre-upload DMG smoke test.
- Refreshes the issue #479 case study with the PR feedback, the broken macOS screenshot, current release evidence, and the vk-bot signing reference snapshot.

## Reproduction / Evidence
- Latest release `v0.204.0` uploaded macOS and Windows assets but no Linux assets.
- The PR feedback screenshot shows the macOS DMG opening as damaged: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-479-ff9c709d56dc/docs/case-studies/issue-479/raw-data/pr-487-macos-broken-screenshot.png?raw=true
- Before the macOS fix, the new static regression tests failed because `desktop/package.json` had no hardened runtime / entitlements / notarization config and the workflow had no signed/ad-hoc macOS split or DMG smoke test.

## Verification
- `node --check desktop/scripts/adhoc-sign-mac.cjs`
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo test --test unit ci_cd::release_publishing::desktop_`
- `cargo test --test unit ci_cd::desktop_release_resolve`
- `cargo test --test unit ci_cd::workflow_release`
- `cargo test --test unit ci_cd::release_publishing`
- `npm test` in `desktop/`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose`
- `cargo test --doc --verbose`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (passes; reports only existing near-limit warnings)
- `git diff --check`
- `git diff --cached --check`



Fixes #479

commits.messageBody:
Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/479

commits.messageHeadline: Fix macOS desktop signing and smoke tests

title: Fix desktop release assets and macOS signing
